permalink: /cryptography/other/apbq-rsa-iv-SekaiCTF2026
title: apbq-rsa-iv - SekaiCTF 2026
---

<br>
<br>

Challenge:


```python
from Crypto.Util.number import getPrime, bytes_to_long
from random import randint

p = getPrime(1024)
q = getPrime(1024)
n = p * q
e = 0x10001

hints = []
for _ in range(3):
    a, b = randint(0, 4**312), randint(0, 4**312)
    hints.append(a * p + b * q)

FLAG = open('flag.txt', 'rb').read().strip()
c = pow(bytes_to_long(FLAG), e, n)
print(f'{n = }')
print(f'{c = }')
print(f'{hints = }')
```



<br>

<br>


```
n = 
c = 
hints = [, , ]
```


<br>


<br>


"Intended is a bespoke coppersmith construction, basically a 160x160 lattice."
